Related Entities

  • hospital HEALTHALLIANCE HOSPITAL MARYS AVENUE CAMPUS 2-star overall rating
  • hospital ELLENVILLE REGIONAL HOSPITAL
  • snf NEW PALTZ CENTER FOR REHABILITATION AND NURSING 1-star, 79 beds
  • snf HUDSON VALLEY REHABILITATION & EXTENDED CARE CTR 1-star, 203 beds
  • snf GOLDEN HILL NURSING AND REHABILITATION CENTER 3-star, 280 beds
  • snf TEN BROECK COMMONS 5-star, 258 beds
  • snf TACONIC REHABILITATION AND NURSING AT ULSTER 2-star, 120 beds
  • snf NORTHEAST CTR FOR REHABILITATION AND BRAIN INJURY 1-star, 280 beds
  • snf WOODLAND POND AT NEW PALTZ 4-star, 40 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-13. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026) CDC SDOH Measures for County (2017-2021)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
